verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All it takes is one moment And just one touch from You. I put aside all distractions, Cause I came for You, I came for You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I need You more than ever, Nothing else satisfies. All my life I surrender. I'll live for You, I'll live for You. I came for You, I came for You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy Spirit You are welcome, Come and move upon this place. We desire an encounter once again. Holy Spirit, Holy Spirit.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now that my heart is open, I am ready for You. Jesus take me deeper. I came for You, I came for You. I came for You, I came for You.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy Spirit You are welcome, Come and move upon this place. We desire an encounter once again.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Send your fire, release your power, So we'll never be the same. We desire an encounter once again.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We make way, we make room, Lord let your spirit move. Have your way in this place, Lord we have come for you.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We make way, we make room, Lord let your spirit move. Have your way in this place, Lord we have come for you.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We make way, we make room, Lord let your spirit move. Have your way in this place, Lord we have come for you.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Holy Spirit You are welcome, Come and move upon this place. We desire an encounter once again.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Send your fire, release your power, So we'll never be the same. We desire an encounter once again. Holy Spirit, Holy Spirit. Holy Spirit, Holy Spirit.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: We make way, we make room, Lord let your spirit move. Have your way in this place, Lord we have come for you.
